description: Style Note Masculine scents from jovan are strong without being overpowering and they last through the day. Keeping you smelling fresh, this one will become an instant favourite. Product Details Jovan's White Musk deodorant for men comes in an aerosol spray canister and has a musky masculine fragrance Fresh clean citrus combines with traces of clove, peppermint, and thyme, and is complimented by geranium, melon, and green apple, unique, sea-like fresh scent gives you a clear, crisp signature fragrance Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 150 ml
